privileged_info_summary: The task requires an agent to navigate to the in-app chat section in Flight Crew View and send the exact message 'Arriving gate B7 at 4:30 PM - meet at baggage claim 3'. The message text is synthetic and task-specific. The verifier checks for the full message text in the final UI state (non-EditText), validates partial substrings ('Arriving gate B7', 'meet at baggage claim 3', '4:30 PM'), and confirms the agent left the Friends home screen (avoiding the 'Add New Friend' forbidden state). Success requires the message to appear in chat history (sent state) rather than remaining in the input field (draft state).
